# modern_colorthief — API Index

Modern ColorThief: High-performance color palette extraction from images.

Rust core with bindings for multiple languages. Manual median-cut algorithm with rayon parallelism.

## Bindings

- [Python](../crates/python-bindings/llms.txt) — `pip install modern_colorthief`
- [Node.js](../crates/node-bindings/llms.txt) — `npm install @modern_colorthief/node`
- [WASM](../crates/wasm-bindings/llms.txt) — `npm install @modern_colorthief/wasm`
- [JVM](../crates/jvm-bindings/llms.txt) — Java/Kotlin
- [Ruby](../crates/ruby-bindings/llms.txt) — Ruby gem

## Common API

All bindings expose:

- `getPalette(image, colorCount?, quality?)` → Array of [R, G, B] colors
- `getColor(image, quality?)` → [R, G, B] dominant color

Parameters:
- `image` — File path, buffer, or language-specific image object
- `colorCount` — Number of colors to extract (default: 10)
- `quality` — Sampling quality 1-10, higher is faster but less accurate (default: 10)

See [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt) for complete documentation.
